meta.title: Nith Digital — Web Design & Development, Scotland
meta.description: A digital agency in Dumfries & Galloway building modern websites, dashboards, and apps for small businesses across Scotland. Fast delivery, fair pricing.
meta.og_title: Nith Digital — Web Design & Development, Scotland

home.hero_headline: Websites for tradespeople and small businesses in Scotland
home.hero_subheading: Custom-built, mobile-friendly websites from £500. Based in Dumfries & Galloway. Live in 1 week.
home.intro_paragraph: Nith Digital builds proper websites for joiners, plumbers, B&Bs, childminders, and local businesses across Dumfries & Galloway and Scotland. Modern design, fair pricing, and someone who actually picks up the phone.

steps.title: Tell us about your business
steps.description: A 15-minute phone call. What you do, who your customers are, what you need. No forms, no questionnaires.

steps.title: We design and build your site
steps.description: You'll see 3 design options before we write a line of code. Pick the one you like, we handle the rest.

steps.title: You're live in 1 week
steps.description: Your site is live, found on Google, and working for you. You own everything — no lock-in, no monthly surprises.

home.services_intro: Website design is what we do best — but it's not all we do.

pricing_items.detail: Perfect for tradespeople and sole traders
For growing businesses with more to say
Full-featured site with all the extras

home.pricing_note: All plans include £40/month hosting & support. Website builds can be split over the first 12 months at no additional cost.
home.trust_statement: 10+ years building software across the NHS, energy, and finance. Based in Sanquhar — not London, not a call centre. One person, direct communication, no account managers.
home.cta_section_body: Call 07404 173024 or drop us a message. No jargon, no pressure — just a straight conversation about what you need and what it'll cost.

work.headline: Work
work.intro: Products we've built and shipped. Real things, live in the wild.

projects.name: Not an Octavia
projects.description: Machine learning model that finds underpriced used cars across the UK. Scans thousands of listings daily using XGBoost, surfaces the best deals, and ranks them by value gap.

projects.name: gAIns
projects.description: AI-powered gym tracker with a built-in coach. Logs workouts, tracks progress over time, and gives personalised programming advice using conversation.

projects.name: Daily Duel
projects.description: 30 daily mini-games — trivia, puzzles, pattern matching, memory. Fresh challenges every day with leaderboards and streaks.

projects.name: Tumble Tots
projects.description: Clean, mobile-first website for a local childminding business. Simple, fast, and easy to find on Google.

services.headline: Services
services.intro: Everything a small business needs to look professional online and run smarter behind the scenes.

service_items.name: Website Design & Development
service_items.description: Custom-built, mobile-first websites. Not templates — every site is designed from scratch for your business, your customers, and your location. Built on Next.js for speed, SEO, and reliability. Includes contact forms, Google optimisation, and proper hosting.

service_items.name: Social Media Management
service_items.description: Consistent, professional content across Facebook and Instagram — scheduled, published, and managed. We handle the posting so you can focus on the work. Automated where it makes sense, human where it matters.

service_items.name: Search Engine Optimisation
service_items.description: Get found on Google. Local SEO that puts you in front of customers searching for what you do, where you do it. Technical optimisation, content strategy, and Google Search Console monitoring — not keyword stuffing.

service_items.name: Analytics & Software Development
service_items.description: Turn your spreadsheets into interactive dashboards. Power BI reporting, custom web apps, job trackers, customer portals — built by someone with a decade in data and software.

about.headline: About
about.story_paragraph: Nith Digital is run by a Senior BI Developer based in Sanquhar, Dumfries & Galloway. With over a decade of experience across healthcare, energy, finance, and the public sector, the focus is on building modern digital tools and turning messy data into clear decisions. The business was born from a simple observation: rural Scotland deserves the same quality of digital services as any city. The name comes from the River Nith, which flows right through Sanquhar on its 70-mile journey to the Solway Firth.
values: Transparent pricing — you know what it costs before we start
Direct communication — one person, not a chain of account managers
No lock-in — you own everything we build
career_highlights: 2018–2024: BI Developer across healthcare, energy, public sector
about.personal_note: Four Commonwealth gold medals in competitive powerlifting. Same approach to both disciplines: show up consistently, put in the reps, and don't cut corners.

contact.headline: Get in touch
contact.intro: Whether you need a website, a dashboard, or just want to talk through an idea — drop a message or pick up the phone.

faq.intro: Common questions about working with us

items.question: How much does a website cost?
items.answer: A standard business website starts at £500 with a £40/month hosting and support fee. Booking systems start at £750. Custom web apps start at £3,000. We'll give you an exact quote after a 15-minute conversation — no surprises.

items.question: How long does a website take to build?
items.answer: Most business websites are live within 1 week from the day we start. More complex projects take 2-4 weeks. We'll give you a timeline upfront and stick to it.

items.question: Do I need to provide content and images?
items.answer: We handle all the copy and design. If you have photos of your work (even phone photos), send them over — they make a huge difference. If not, we'll source professional imagery that fits your industry.

items.question: Will my website work on mobile?
items.answer: Every site we build is mobile-first. Over 60% of your visitors will be on their phone, so that's where we start the design. Desktop is the adaptation, not the other way around.

items.question: Can I update the site myself?
items.answer: We handle all updates for you. If you need a change — new photos, updated text, a new page — just message us. Post-launch changes are billed at £35 per hour, and most small updates take 15-30 minutes.

items.question: What if I'm not happy with the design?
items.answer: We show you 3 design concepts before building anything. You pick the direction, request changes, and approve a final design. We don't start coding until you're happy with what you see.

testimonials.quote: Akin built our website in under two weeks. Clean design, works perfectly on mobile, and we're already getting enquiries through it. No fuss, no jargon — just got on with it.
testimonials.name: Recent client

testimonials.quote: We'd been quoted over £3,000 by a Glasgow agency for something half as good. Nith Digital delivered a better site for a fraction of the price — and actually answered the phone when we had questions.
testimonials.name: Recent client

testimonials.quote: The dashboard Akin built completely changed how we look at our numbers. What used to take a full day of spreadsheet work now takes 30 seconds. Should have done it years ago.
testimonials.name: Recent client
